caption: In a formal legislative or parliamentary setting, a group of men are seated in tiered rows of wooden benches. Many are dressed in traditional Indian attire, including white kurtas and dark Nehru jackets, while others wear western-style suits and ties. In the foreground, a man in a white kurta stands behind a podium, addressing the assembly. Behind him, several men sit attentively; some have their hands folded or are listening intently. The environment features a muted green backdrop and structured wooden paneling. Across the sequence, the scene remains largely static, with minimal movement among the participants as the speaker continues to address the room. There are no visible logos, on-screen text, or electronic equipment other than the microphones positioned at the podium. The lighting is bright and consistent, emphasizing the formal atmosphere of the proceedings.
